evidence_text:
28机组控制面板(UCP)
Chiller (冷水机组)
Description 说明 Units (机  组) notes 备注
1. Front Panel Control Type
前端面板控制类型
2. Front Panel Chilled Water Setpoint
前端面板冷冻水设定
3. Front Panel Current Limit Setpoint
前端面板电流限制设定
4. Front Panel Base Load Command
前端面板基本负荷要求
5. Front Panel Base Load Setpoint
前端面板基本负荷设定
6. Differential to Start  起动温差
7. Differential to Stop停机温差
8. Setpoint Source
设定值来源(Chilled Water, Hot Water), Chilled Water default
(冷冻水, 热水), 冷冻水为默认类型
Temperature
温度
Percent
百分比
On or Auto
开或者自动
Percent
百分比
Temperature 温度
Temperature 温度
(none,use front panel,override BAS), none default
(无, 使用前端面板, BAS超控), 无为默认值1
2
Description 说明 Units (机  组)Feature Settings( 功能设定 )
1. Chilled Water Reset
冷冻水重置
2. Return Reset Ratio  返回重置率
3. Return Start Reset  返回起动重置
4. Return Maximum Reset 返回最大重置
5. Outdoor Reset Ratio 室外重置率
6. Outdoor Start Reset 室外起动重置
7. Outdoor Maximum Reset  室外最大重置
8. External Chilled Water Setpoint   外部冷冻水设定
9. External Current Limit Setpoint   外部电流限制设定
10.
judge_reason: 'Command' implies an action, not a persistent configurable parameter.
